title: V8 sandbox violation in icu_74::UnicodeString::doAppend
bounty_rationale: V8 sandbox bypass demonstrating memory corruption outside the V8 heap sandbox
description_snippet:
#### VULNERABILITY DETAILS
Converting a long string to local encoding via `"<...>".localeCompare` causes an OOB write.  

#### VERSION
V8 commit: 69b47d88cb8f3bff0966000cd039b50786bbd891

#### REPRODUCTION CASE

Build args:
```
is_debug=false
is_asan=true
v8_enable_sandbox=true
v8_enable_memory_corr
